During 1909 California developed
555,177 kilowats of electric power,
Washington 163,904. Oregon T6.965,

500. The output of artificial gas

600: Idaho, 42,000,000; British Co

Washington electric power was

half by water power. The ratio OF

fornia and Oregon, but in British
